--- ### ALL PAGES ### layout: themes/classy/admin/core/minimal ### THEME CONFIG ### theme: header: title: content: "Create User" icon: "user-plus" breadcrumbs: items: - label: "Admin" href: "/admin" - label: "Users" href: "/admin/users" - label: "Create User" ### REGULAR PAGES ### meta: title: "Create User - Admin" description: "Create a new user account" breadcrumb: "Create User" ---
{% uj_icon "arrow-left", "fa-sm me-2" %} Back to Users
Create New User
Must be at least 6 characters
Cancel
{% uj_icon "circle-info", "fa-sm me-2" %} How it works
  • A Firebase Auth account is created with the provided email and password
  • The backend automatically creates the Firestore user document
  • The user can sign in immediately with their credentials
